overview: Autonomous Edge-Case Traffic Agent — a simulation-based intelligent traffic management platform with real-time traffic flow prediction, anomaly detection, adaptive vehicle rerouting, emergency response prioritization, human feedback integration, weather-aware intelligence, system health monitoring, and predictive wait time estimation.
features: Real-time traffic flow simulation with ML-style High/Medium/Low classification
Edge-case anomaly detection with instant alerts for accidents, obstacles, pedestrians
Adaptive vehicle rerouting engine using graph pathfinding (A*/Dijkstra simulation)
Emergency vehicle detection and priority routing with signal adjustment
Human-in-the-loop incident reporting with crowd-source validation
Weather-aware traffic intelligence with disruption predictions
System health monitoring dashboard for sensors and AI modules
Predictive waiting time and congestion delay estimation with explainability
Multi-district city simulation with real-time polling updates
Color-coded interactive traffic map with animated live data
